task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent logged into the Azure DevOps web interface (or using git in the terminal) and viewing the 'TailwindTraders' repository.

task_completion.description: Locate the offending commit containing the sensitive data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the commit history or commit details specifically displaying the message 'Add API keys and database credentials for deployment'.
Screenshots show the agent initiating and completing a revert action (e.g., clicking 'Revert' in the Azure DevOps UI, creating a revert branch/PR, or running 'git revert' in the terminal).

task_completion.description: Merge the reverted changes into the 'main' branch.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a completed/merged Pull Request targeting the 'main' branch, or terminal output confirming a successful push of the revert commit to 'main'.

task_completion.description: Ensure 'config/secrets.json' is removed from the repository.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the repository file explorer on the 'main' branch with the 'config/secrets.json' file no longer present, or the final commit diff explicitly showing the deletion of 'config/secrets.json'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Azure DevOps platform or a genuine terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a real web browser navigating Azure DevOps or a real terminal executing git commands, rather than a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a standard revert procedure rather than just manually deleting the file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of a 'revert' action (UI button or git command) that references the original bad commit hash, rather than a manual file deletion and a new disconnected commit.

integrity.description: Ensure the final success state was not faked using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI elements for the merged PR or the file explorer should look consistent with Azure DevOps styling, with no visible developer console open modifying the DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The repository name is 'TailwindTraders'. The Azure DevOps Server API base URL is 'http://localhost/DefaultCollection' (or 'http://localhost:8080/tfs/DefaultCollection').
